recalls.Description: TTI Consumer Power Tools has announced a recall for the RIDGID 18Volt Brushless 21-Degree and 30-Degree Framing Nailers. The affected units may have a malfunctioning dual action engagement system that can cause nails to discharge unexpectedly, creating a serious laceration risk. Consumers should check the data plate on the side of the nail tray or on the bottom of the nailer to identify if their product is part of this recall. Only nailers without a black ink mark or a punched hole next to the serial number are included in this recall.
recalls.Title: TTI Consumer Power Tools Issues Recall for RIDGID Framing Nailers Due to Injury Risk
recalls.ConsumerContact: For more information, contact TTI Consumer Power Tools at 800-597-9624 from 9 a.m. to 5 p.m. ET, Monday through Friday, or visit powertools.ridgid.com/recall for detailed instructions.

Products.Name: RIDGID 18Volt Brushless 21-Degree Framing Nailer
Products.NumberOfUnits: About 64,000 (In addition, about 6,575 were sold in Canada)

Retailers.Name: Available at Home Depot and Direct Tools Factory Outlet stores across the U.S. and online at www.homedepot.com and www.directtoolsoutlet.com from July 2021 to May 2025, priced between $329 and $389.

Importers.Name: TTI Consumer Power Tools, Inc., of Anderson, South Carolina

Hazards.Name: Risk of laceration due to potential malfunction causing unexpected nail discharge

Remedies.Name: Stop using the nailers immediately and check for recall eligibility online. A prepaid return label will be provided for the recalled nailers, which will be repaired and returned.

recalls.metaDescription: TTI recalls RIDGID Framing Nailers due to laceration hazards. Check if your nailer is affected and learn how to get a free repair.
